---
name: Lexical Disagreement
about: Disagreement with a specific word-choice decision
title: "[LEXICAL] <verse reference>: <source word> rendered as <chosen gloss>"
labels: lexical, verse-feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Verse

Reference: (e.g., Romans 1:1)
Canonical ID: (optional)

## Source word

Greek or Hebrew word in dispute: (e.g., δοῦλος)

## Current English gloss

What the Cartha Translation currently uses: (e.g., "servant")

## Proposed gloss

What you'd use instead: (e.g., "slave")

## Rationale

Why you believe the proposed gloss is better. Include:

- Lexicon citations (BDAG, HALOT, LSJ, Louw-Nida)
- Parallel usage in other biblical passages
- Comparison to other English translations
- Linguistic or historical context

## Our current rationale

If you've read the lexical_decisions section of the verse YAML, what in
our stated rationale do you disagree with?
